changes.reason: Batch D isolated charm-wall admission test. Prior supported-admission geometry improved objective when it relaxed higher-high confirmation to 0.5 while requiring better higher-low support; current base still has only 5 charm-wall trades but strong convex payoff and no slow trades.

Pair the relaxed higher-high threshold with stronger support confirmation. This keeps the experiment from becoming a loose wall-chase admission and follows the prior successful mechanism rather than the failed VWAP-cap variant.

Expand the wall-distance box from 20 to 25 to retest the supported charm-wall breakaway geometry that previously improved score, while deliberately avoiding the es-vwap.max-distance cap that suppressed profit in run_039.

recommendation.expected_effect: Should add or recover high-convexity charm_wall_breakaway_long opportunities while preserving the profile's no-slow-trade behavior and strong PnL/exposure. Reject if total net profit falls below 98% of run_029, profile PnL/exposure drops below about 225, global worst MAE worsens beyond -513.4, or the added trades cannibalize protected pullback/charm-pin winners.
recommendation.label: promote
recommendation.rationale: Choose the charm_wall_breakaway_long strategy-profile family as the next experiment. The current leader is plateaued, direct 1DTE tightening and no-0DTE compression have hurt or gone flat, and broad veto work risks cutting protected fast winners. The cleanest legal config-only move is to retest the prior successful charm-wall supported-admission mechanism without repeating the failed VWAP cap or take-profit compression.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_wall_breakaway_long has only 5 trades but contributes $985.6, about $197 average PnL, 234.36 PnL/exposure hour, median MFE 146.2, no slow >=12h trades, and worst MAE -346.8. Prior supported admission improved objective, while adding a VWAP cap hurt.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Wall Supported Admission Holdout
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Small sample risk is high; the expanded wall box can admit weaker continuation attempts or cannibalize existing high-quality entries without improving total score.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: VALID_0DTE charm-wall breakaway context with price above the charm wall, require-breakout true, and ES higher-low support confirmed.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: charm_wall_breakaway_long PnL/exposure remains >=225, total net profit remains >=98% of run_029, completed trades do not drop more than 10%, slow_12h remains 0, and global worst MAE is no worse than -513.4.

strategy_hypotheses.evidence: charm_pin_pullback_long owns the global -513.4 MAE while contributing $1261.5 over 34 trades. Static local extension-box edits were flat, and protected fast extended-VWAP winners overlap the warning features.
strategy_hypotheses.name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
strategy_hypotheses.risk: Can overfit a small number of delayed recoveries or block clean high-extension winners unless validated against protected fast-winner retention.
strategy_hypotheses.trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long high-extension or recent-high-rejection entries that fail to make early positive progress after entry.
strategy_hypotheses.validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL, >=95% protected fast extended-VWAP winners, total net profit >=98%, and slow_12h remains 0.
